AI Solution Architect.Junior: Can you explain what a large language model is and describe a project where you used one?
AI Solution Architect.Mid-Level: Describe how you would design a basic RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) pipeline for a customer support use case.
AI Solution Architect.Senior: Walk me through how you would architect an enterprise-grade AI solution that integrates multiple LLM providers with fallback support.
AI Solution Architect.Lead: How would you lead a team in designing an AI platform that balances cost, latency, and accuracy across multiple use cases?
AI Solution Architect.Principal: Describe your approach to setting the long-term AI architecture strategy for an organization adopting generative AI at scale.
AI Solution Architect.Distinguished: How would you evaluate and justify a multi-year investment in a proprietary versus open-source AI platform strategy for a large enterprise?

AI Consultant.Junior: What factors would you consider when recommending an AI tool to a small business client?
AI Consultant.Mid-Level: How would you assess whether a client's use case is a good fit for generative AI versus traditional automation?
AI Consultant.Senior: Describe how you would structure an AI readiness assessment for an enterprise client.
AI Consultant.Lead: How do you manage competing stakeholder expectations when advising on an AI transformation roadmap?
AI Consultant.Principal: How would you advise a client on building internal AI governance policies?
AI Consultant.Distinguished: Describe how you would shape an industry-wide AI adoption strategy while advising multiple enterprise clients.

Cloud Architect.Junior: What is the difference between IaaS, PaaS, and SaaS, and when would you use each?
Cloud Architect.Mid-Level: How would you design a highly available three-tier application on a public cloud provider?
Cloud Architect.Senior: Describe how you would architect a multi-region disaster recovery strategy for a mission-critical application.
Cloud Architect.Lead: How would you lead a cloud migration for a large enterprise with strict compliance requirements?
Cloud Architect.Principal: Describe your approach to setting cloud architecture standards across multiple business units.
Cloud Architect.Distinguished: How would you design a cloud strategy that balances multi-cloud flexibility with operational complexity at an enterprise scale?

default.Junior: Tell me about a recent technical project you worked on and the role you played in it.
default.Mid-Level: Describe a challenging technical problem you solved recently and how you approached it.
default.Senior: How do you approach making architectural decisions when the trade-offs aren't obvious?
default.Lead: How do you balance hands-on technical work with leading and mentoring a team?
default.Principal: How do you influence technical direction across teams that you don't directly manage?
default.Distinguished: How do you drive technical strategy and standards across an entire organization?
